$description: LATTICE Theme #1 — Fine Dining · WARM preset. Token overrides only. Warmer surface tones (more terracotta in the cream), a softer gold, and an amber-tinted dark surface. Use this when the Fine Dining brand needs to feel intimate, candlelit, late-summer — a long Sunday lunch, a harvest menu, a wine-paired dinner in November.

$metadata.design_intent: Warmer neutrals (terracotta undertone), softer gold, amber-tinted dark surface. Harvest / candlelit / Sunday-lunch variant.

500.$description: Warm hero gold — pulls slightly amber

surface.$description: Warm cream — more terracotta than the base surface

surfaceDark.$description: Amber-tinted dark surface — candle-warm, not espresso-cool

textMuted.$description: Warm muted — sits naturally on the warmer surfaces

colored.$description: Amber-tinted primary halo — softer than the base

eyebrow.$description: Slightly tighter eyebrow for the warm, conversational feel

base.$description: Slightly slower — the WARM preset feels a touch more relaxed
